title: gnutls security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[3.8.10-3]
- Fix CVE-2025-9820, CVE-2025-14831, drop unused patches
- Fix PKCS#11 token initialization label overflow (CVE-2025-9820)
- Fix name constraint processing performance issue (CVE-2025-14831)
- Drop unused patches
full_text:
[3.8.10-3]
- Fix CVE-2025-9820, CVE-2025-14831, drop unused patches
- Fix PKCS#11 token initialization label overflow (CVE-2025-9820)
- Fix name constraint processing performance issue (CVE-2025-14831)
- Drop unused patches

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-3477.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-14831.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-9820.html
